title: Add Barobo, Caraga weather forecast below Philippine Standard Time on Home page

requirements.text: Add a weather forecast section for “Barobo, Caraga” on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) positioned directly below the Philippine Standard Time display (the <PhilippineTimeClock /> area).

quotes: In the home page below the Philippine Standard Time can you place the weather forecast in-Barobo, Caraga

acceptanceCriteria: On the Home page, a weather forecast block is visible immediately under the Philippine Standard Time line on both mobile and desktop layouts.
The location label is shown in English as “Barobo, Caraga”.

requirements.text: Implement client-side fetching of the Barobo, Caraga forecast using React Query, including loading and error states, and display a concise forecast summary (at minimum: current conditions and a multi-day forecast).
acceptanceCriteria: Weather data is fetched asynchronously via React Query and does not block initial page render.
While fetching, the weather section shows a clear loading state.
If the fetch fails, the weather section shows a clear error state and does not break the rest of the Home page.
The weather section displays current conditions (e.g., temperature + condition) and at least a 3-day forecast (date/day + high/low and condition).

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only).
Do not modify immutable hook files (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx).
nonGoals: Do not add user-selectable locations or a full weather settings page.
Do not implement real-time weather updates via websockets or push notifications.
